mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cms.files (saved_folder, org_file_name, physical_file_name, file_size, mime_type) VALUES (#{savedFolder}, #{orgFileName}, #{physicalFileName}, #{fileSize}, #{mimeType})
INSERT INTO cms.file_match (table_name, target_id, file_id, file_type) VALUES (#{tableName}, #{targetId}, #{fileId}, #{fileType})
mapper.select:
SELECT file_id as fileId, saved_folder as savedFolder, org_file_name as orgFileName, physical_file_name as physicalFileName, file_size as fileSize, mime_type as mimeType FROM cms.files WHERE file_id IN
#{id}
